title: Bone Crafted Key
description: This key unlocks the elevator that leads to the inner sanctum of New Paineel.

description: This key unlocks the portal within the first island in the Plane of Sky.

description: This key unlocks the entrance to the Ruins of Old Paineel.

title: Islands of Sky Keys
description: These keys unlock the portals connecting the islands in the Plane of Sky.
